title: Title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6-A.  LOUISIANA COSMETOLOGY ACT

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§561.  Title

This Chapter shall be known and cited as the "Louisiana Cosmetology Act".

Acts 2001, No. 907, §2, eff. June 26, 2001.
